UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the nurturing matron's earthly abundance, her benevolent smile, and the image of the black rabbit foot and blooming flowers.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the voluptuous queen or the luxurious throne as they may distract from the card's focus on nurturing and earthly abundance.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Pentacles card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, drone, ambient, ethereal, warm, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the dowager's possessiveness and control, as well as the rabbit fleeing the wilted pentacle clutched by the throne.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the jewels and thorns, as they may symbolize a negative aspect of the character's nature.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Pentacles card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, minor, contemplative, earthy, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Pentacles card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the balance, stewardship, and nurturing qualities of the Queen of Pentacles as she tends to her lush garden and rabbit.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the regal or queenly aspects of this card, focusing instead on the earthy and practical nature of the character.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Pentacles card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, oboe, ambient, ethereal, warm, minor, instrumental
